'''Calian aerial battleships''' were the largest vessels in the [[Calian Fleet]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Battleshipsunk.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A battleship's bow.]]
Large and complex, they were practically flying cities. Each vessel was equipped with numerous [[energy cannon]]s and were capable of launching numerous [[Calian flier]]s.

==History==
[[Bentilais san Sk'ar|Sk'ar]] attempted to use such a ship to drop an [[anti-matter bomb]] on [[Illyriaqüm]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 54}} {{1st}}
